xml.dom/DocumentType/entities.name: entities
xml.dom/DocumentType/entities.description: This is a NamedNodeMap giving the definitions of external entities. For entity names defined more than once, only the first definition is provided (others are ignored as required by the XML recommendation). This may be None if the information is not provided by the parser, or if no entities are defined.

xml.dom/dom/EMPTY_NAMESPACE.name: EMPTY_NAMESPACE
xml.dom/dom/EMPTY_NAMESPACE.description: The value used to indicate that no namespace is associated with a node in the DOM. This is typically found as the namespaceURI of a node, or used as the namespaceURI parameter to a namespaces-specific method.
